page.title: Sailboat Rental Marbella: Crewed & Bareboat Options

data.meta_description: Discover sailboat rental Marbella with crewed and bareboat options. Explore the Costa del Sol from Puerto Banús. Book your sailing charter today.
data.summary: Explore sailboat rental Marbella options including crewed charters and bareboat hires. Our fleet departs from Puerto Banús with licensed skippers, fuel, and drinks included.
key_facts: Crewed and bareboat sailboat rental Marbella options available.
All charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella.
Inclusions: licensed skipper, fuel, drinks (water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava), light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, 21% IVA.
Fleet includes Lagoon 380 (11.6m, 10 pax) and Dubhe (8m, 5 pax).
Prices start from €749/2h for Tier A motor yachts; sailboat pricing on request via WhatsApp.
Explore Cabopino, Estepona, Sotogrande, and Cala del Faro on a sailing trip.
Bareboat rental requires valid sailing license and experience; crewed charters include professional skipper.
Book directly via WhatsApp for custom itineraries and availability.

faq.q: What sailboats are available for rental in Marbella?
faq.a: Our fleet includes the Lagoon 380 (11.6m, 10 pax) and Dubhe (8m, 5 pax), both departing from Puerto Banús. For specific availability and pricing, please contact us via WhatsApp.

faq.q: Can I rent a sailboat without a skipper in Marbella?
faq.a: Yes, bareboat rental is available if you hold a valid sailing license and have sufficient experience. However, we recommend a crewed charter for a stress-free experience, especially if you're unfamiliar with local waters.

faq.q: What is included in a crewed sailboat charter?
faq.a: Every crewed charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). You just bring your swimwear and sunscreen.

faq.q: Where can I sail from Marbella?
faq.a: Popular sailing destinations include Cabopino, Estepona, Sotogrande, Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, and the coast of Gibraltar. Your skipper can tailor the itinerary based on wind conditions and your preferences.

faq.q: How much does a sailboat rental in Marbella cost?
faq.a: Pricing depends on the boat and duration. For sailboats, rates are available on request via WhatsApp. As a reference, our motor yachts start from €749/2h (Tier A). Contact us for a custom quote.

faq.q: What is the best time of year for sailing in Marbella?
faq.a: The sailing season runs from April to October, with peak conditions in June through September. Average summer temperatures are 28-32°C, and the Mediterranean sea is calm, making for ideal sailing.

faq.q: Do I need a license to rent a sailboat bareboat in Marbella?
faq.a: Yes, for bareboat rental you need a valid sailing license recognized in Spain (e.g., PER or equivalent). You must also demonstrate experience. Crewed charters require no license—just relax and enjoy.

faq.q: How do I book a sailboat rental in Marbella?
faq.a: Book directly via WhatsApp. Provide your preferred date, number of guests, and any special requests. We'll confirm availability and send you a quote within hours.

data.body_html:
Experience the freedom of the Mediterranean with a sailboat rental Marbella from Puerto Banús. Whether you prefer a crewed charter with a professional skipper or a bareboat adventure for licensed sailors, our fleet offers options for every level. Explore hidden coves, anchor off the Golden Mile, or sail to Estepona—all with full inclusions like fuel, drinks, and insurance. No hidden extras, just the sea.

Our Sailboat Fleet in Marbella

We offer two sailboats departing from Puerto Banús. For larger groups, the Lagoon 380 (11.6m, 10 pax) is a spacious catamaran ideal for day trips or overnight charters. The Dubhe (8m, 5 pax) is a classic monohull perfect for couples or small families. Both boats are maintained to high standards and include all safety equipment.

Crewed vs Bareboat: What's Right for You?

Crewed charter includes a licensed skipper who handles navigation, anchoring, and safety. You sit back, sip a cold beer, and enjoy the views. Perfect for first-timers or those who want a relaxing day.

Bareboat rental is available for experienced sailors with a valid license. You take the helm and plan your own itinerary. We provide a briefing on local conditions, but the adventure is yours. Contact us via WhatsApp to discuss requirements.

Inclusions on Every Charter

All our sailboat rentals include: licensed skipper (crewed only), fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No surprises—just bring your towel and sunscreen.

Popular Sailing Destinations from Marbella

  • Cabopino – 8 NM east, sandy beach and dunes.
  • Cala del Faro – 5 NM west, quiet cove with crystal water.
  • Estepona – 15 NM west, charming marina and old town.
  • Sotogrande – 25 NM west, luxury marina and polo clubs.
  • Cala Cortés – 10 NM east, secluded swimming spot.

Your skipper will choose the best route based on wind and weather, ensuring a safe and memorable trip.

Pricing and Booking

Pricing for sailboat rentals is on request via WhatsApp. As a reference, our motor yachts start from €749/2h (Tier A). Contact us for a custom quote on the Lagoon 380 or Dubhe. We recommend booking at least 48 hours in advance, especially during summer.

To book, send a WhatsApp message with your preferred date, number of guests, and any special requests. We'll confirm availability and send you a quote within hours.

Why Choose Our Sailboat Rental Marbella?

We operate directly from Puerto Banús, the heart of Marbella's luxury boating scene. No middlemen, no inflated prices. Our skippers know the coast intimately—from the Golden Mile to the cliffs of Cala del Faro. Every charter is tailored to your group, whether it's a family day out, a birthday celebration, or a romantic sunset sail.

Explore our full boat rental Marbella options for more choices, including motor yachts and speedboats.

Frequently asked questions

What sailboats are available for rental in Marbella?

Our fleet includes the Lagoon 380 (11.6m, 10 pax) and Dubhe (8m, 5 pax), both departing from Puerto Banús. For specific availability and pricing, please contact us via WhatsApp.

Can I rent a sailboat without a skipper in Marbella?

Yes, bareboat rental is available if you hold a valid sailing license and have sufficient experience. However, we recommend a crewed charter for a stress-free experience, especially if you're unfamiliar with local waters.

What is included in a crewed sailboat charter?

Every crewed charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). You just bring your swimwear and sunscreen.

Where can I sail from Marbella?

Popular sailing destinations include Cabopino, Estepona, Sotogrande, Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, and the coast of Gibraltar. Your skipper can tailor the itinerary based on wind conditions and your preferences.

How much does a sailboat rental in Marbella cost?

Pricing depends on the boat and duration. For sailboats, rates are available on request via WhatsApp. As a reference, our motor yachts start from €749/2h (Tier A). Contact us for a custom quote.

What is the best time of year for sailing in Marbella?

The sailing season runs from April to October, with peak conditions in June through September. Average summer temperatures are 28-32°C, and the Mediterranean sea is calm, making for ideal sailing.

Do I need a license to rent a sailboat bareboat in Marbella?

Yes, for bareboat rental you need a valid sailing license recognized in Spain (e.g., PER or equivalent). You must also demonstrate experience. Crewed charters require no license—just relax and enjoy.

How do I book a sailboat rental in Marbella?

Book directly via WhatsApp. Provide your preferred date, number of guests, and any special requests. We'll confirm availability and send you a quote within hours.
